metaDescription: Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking-2506 (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2025-06-21 — part of the Kimi-VL line. Updated thinking VL model: higher multimodal-reasoning accuracy…
overview: Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking-2506 is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi-VL line. Released 2025-06-21. Open-weight 16B-parameter MoE (3B active) vision-language model line for multimodal reasoning and long-context understanding.

What's notable in this version: Updated thinking VL model: higher multimodal-reasoning accuracy (e.g. MathVision 56.9), ~20% shorter reasoning, and 4x higher single-image resolution (up to 1792x1792).
